positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala composition featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and orbiting celestial bodies. The primary subjects include crescent moons, delicate lunar pathways, and intricate, abstract leaves formed from stained glass patterns. Use a color palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, soft lavender, and shimmering gold accents. Minimalist vector art style with strong silhouettes, centered composition, flat lay aesthetic, high contrast, perfect for apparel printing. Intricate tessellation pattern, perfect circle shape.
